Offline banner called useServiceWorker again, causing duplicate SW registration/listeners.","status":"closed","priority":2,"issue_type":"bug","created_at":"2026-01-12T14:42:16.833972905-05:00","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-01-12T14:42:33.346905978-05:00","closed_at":"2026-01-12T14:42:33.346905978-05:00","close_reason":"Applied incident impact to status summary and routed SW state from Providers to OfflineBanner"} {"id":"jeffreysprompts.com-cs7","title":"Build RelatedPrompts component for permalink pages","description":"**Details:** - Shows related prompts based on tag overlap + BM25 similarity - Displayed at bottom of /prompts/[id] pages - Click navigates to related prompt - Limited to 4-6 suggestions **Implementation:** ```typescript // apps/web/src/components/related-prompts.tsx interface RelatedPromptsProps { promptId: string; limit?: number; } export function RelatedPrompts({ promptId, limit = 5 }: RelatedPromptsProps) { const related = useMemo(() => { const current = getPrompt(promptId); if (!current) return []; // Score by tag overlap + BM25 on title/description const candidates = prompts.filter(p => p.id !== promptId); const scored = candidates.map(p => ({ prompt: p, score: calculateTagOverlap(current.tags, p.tags) + bm25Score(current.title + ' ' + current.description, p) })); return scored .sort((a, b) => b.score - a.score) .slice(0, limit) .map(s => s.prompt); }, [promptId, limit]); if (related.length === 0) return null; return (

Related Prompts

{related.map(p => ( ))}
); } ``` **Scoring Algorithm:** - Tag overlap: +1 point per shared tag - BM25: Score title+description against current prompt - Weighted sum: 60% tags, 40% BM25 **Location:** apps/web/src/components/related-prompts.tsx **Reasoning:** Related prompts increase engagement and help users discover more content. Tag overlap ensures topical relevance while BM25 adds semantic similarity.","notes":"Added RelatedPrompts component and wired into prompt permalink content","status":"closed","priority":2,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-01-10T00:35:23.87036225-05:00","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-01-10T16:41:34.215887393-05:00","closed_at":"2026-01-10T16:41:34.2158915-05:00","dependencies":[{"issue_id":"jeffreysprompts.com-cs7","depends_on_id":"jeffreysprompts.com-z16","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-01-10T00:37:54.781837612-05:00","created_by":"ubuntu"}]} {"id":"jeffreysprompts.com-ctt5","title":"Implement CLI configuration file management","description":"## Task Implement CLI configuration file support for JeffreysPrompts CLI. ## Scope CLI client-side behavior; belongs in the public repo. Depends on Premium CLI auth and sync flows for endpoint defaults. ## Features - Create ~/.jeffreysprompts/config.json on first run - Store API endpoint, auth tokens, preferences - Support project-local .jeffreysprompts.json - Environment variable overrides - Config validation on load ## Configuration Options ```json { "apiEndpoint": "https://api.jeffreysprompts.com", "defaultVisibility": "private", "syncOnSave": true, "offlineMode": false, "theme": "auto", "editor": "code", "outputFormat": "pretty" } ``` ## CLI Commands - jfp config list - Show current config - jfp config get - Get config value - jfp config set - Set config value - jfp config reset - Reset to defaults - jfp config path - Show config file location ## Logging Requirements - Log config resolution order (project -> user -> env -> defaults) - Log validation failures with actionable hints - Log config migration steps when schema changes ## Success Criteria - Config persists across sessions - Project config overrides global - Env vars take precedence - Invalid config handled gracefully ## Origin Moved from `jeffreysprompts_premium-rh0g`. ","status":"closed","priority":3,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-01-11T02:24:05.114652797-05:00","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-01-11T05:15:13.808062697-05:00","closed_at":"2026-01-11T05:15:13.808062697-05:00","close_reason":"Implemented config commands: list, get, set, reset, path. Build passing."} -{"id":"jeffreysprompts.com-cu2y","title":"Integration Tests: Performance & SEO Outputs","description":"## Origin Moved from jeffreysprompts_premium jeffreysprompts_premium-k76l. ## Task Create integration tests for SEO outputs, performance budgets, and image optimization. ## Why This Matters - SEO artifacts must be correct for discoverability - Performance regressions hurt conversion - Image optimization impacts speed and cost ## Test Scenarios ### SEO Outputs 1. Generate sitemap and validate URLs 2. Ensure robots.txt references sitemap 3. Validate canonical tags for key pages ### Performance Budgets 1. Bundle size within configured budget 2. Lighthouse/Core Web Vitals thresholds met in CI mode 3. Fail with actionable bundle diff ### Image Optimization 1. Verify optimized image response headers 2. Ensure CDN caching headers present 3. Confirm size reduction for large images ## Logging Requirements - Log bundle size metrics - Log Core Web Vitals scores - Record sitemap URL counts and invalid entries ## Files to Create - tests/integration/seo/sitemap.test.ts - tests/integration/perf/bundle-budget.test.ts - tests/integration/perf/image-optimization.test.ts ## Success Criteria - SEO artifacts valid - Perf budgets enforced - Image optimization verified ","status":"open","priority":2,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-01-11T01:29:38.765619126-05:00","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-01-11T01:29:38.765619126-05:00","dependencies":[{"issue_id":"jeffreysprompts.com-cu2y","depends_on_id":"jeffreysprompts.com-qg15","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-01-11T01:30:01.474839309-05:00","created_by":"ubuntu"},{"issue_id":"jeffreysprompts.com-cu2y","depends_on_id":"jeffreysprompts.com-xd0s","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-01-11T01:30:01.600226874-05:00","created_by":"ubuntu"},{"issue_id":"jeffreysprompts.com-cu2y","depends_on_id":"jeffreysprompts.com-drns","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-01-11T01:30:01.724327452-05:00","created_by":"ubuntu"}]} +{"id":"jeffreysprompts.com-cu2y","title":"Integration Tests: Performance & SEO Outputs","description":"## Origin Moved from jeffreysprompts_premium jeffreysprompts_premium-k76l. ## Task Create integration tests for SEO outputs, performance budgets, and image optimization. ## Why This Matters - SEO artifacts must be correct for discoverability - Performance regressions hurt conversion - Image optimization impacts speed and cost ## Test Scenarios ### SEO Outputs 1. Generate sitemap and validate URLs 2. Ensure robots.txt references sitemap 3. Validate canonical tags for key pages ### Performance Budgets 1. Bundle size within configured budget 2. Lighthouse/Core Web Vitals thresholds met in CI mode 3. Fail with actionable bundle diff ### Image Optimization 1. Verify optimized image response headers 2. Ensure CDN caching headers present 3. Confirm size reduction for large images ## Logging Requirements - Log bundle size metrics - Log Core Web Vitals scores - Record sitemap URL counts and invalid entries ## Files to Create - tests/integration/seo/sitemap.test.ts - tests/integration/perf/bundle-budget.test.ts - tests/integration/perf/image-optimization.test.ts ## Success Criteria - SEO artifacts valid - Perf budgets enforced - Image optimization verified ","status":"closed","priority":2,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-01-11T01:29:38.765619126-05:00","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-01-12T19:34:35.290302488-05:00","closed_at":"2026-01-12T19:34:35.290302488-05:00","close_reason":"Added 27 integration tests across 3 files: (1) sitemap.test.ts - validates XML structure, required pages, robots.txt reference; (2) bundle-budget.test.ts - validates size-limit config and compliance; (3) image-optimization.test.ts - validates Next.js image config and detects large images","dependencies":[{"issue_id":"jeffreysprompts.com-cu2y","depends_on_id":"jeffreysprompts.com-qg15","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-01-11T01:30:01.474839309-05:00","created_by":"ubuntu"},{"issue_id":"jeffreysprompts.com-cu2y","depends_on_id":"jeffreysprompts.com-xd0s","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-01-11T01:30:01.600226874-05:00","created_by":"ubuntu"},{"issue_id":"jeffreysprompts.com-cu2y","depends_on_id":"jeffreysprompts.com-drns","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-01-11T01:30:01.724327452-05:00","created_by":"ubuntu"}]} {"id":"jeffreysprompts.com-cux3","title":"Fix install-cli PATH instructions","description":"install-cli.sh printed literal install_dir; update to print PATH line with install_dir expanded (keeping PATH placeholder in output).","status":"closed","priority":2,"issue_type":"bug","created_at":"2026-01-11T13:06:40.450568286-05:00","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-01-11T13:07:38.018241449-05:00","closed_at":"2026-01-11T13:07:38.018241449-05:00","close_reason":"Updated install-cli.sh to print PATH line with expanded install_dir and keep PATH placeholder."} {"id":"jeffreysprompts.com-cwcj","title":"Add share_links schema tables","description":"## Origin Moved from jeffreysprompts_premium jeffreysprompts_premium-318. ## Task Add share_links table for private link sharing of content. ## Schema Definition ```typescript export const shareLinks = pgTable("share_links", { id: uuid("id").primaryKey().defaultRandom(), userId: uuid("user_id").notNull().references(() => users.id), // What is being shared contentType: text("content_type", { enum: ["user_prompt", "prompt_pack", "skill", "collection"] }).notNull(), contentId: uuid("content_id").notNull(), // The shareable link code (appears in URL) linkCode: text("link_code").notNull().unique(), // Optional security passwordHash: text("password_hash"), // bcrypt hash if password protected // Expiration expiresAt: timestamp("expires_at", { withTimezone: true }), // Stats viewCount: integer("view_count").default(0), // Status isActive: boolean("is_active").default(true).notNull(), // Timestamps createdAt: timestamp("created_at", { withTimezone: true }).defaultNow().notNull(), }, (table) => [ index("idx_share_links_user").on(table.userId), index("idx_share_links_code").on(table.linkCode), index("idx_share_links_content").on(table.contentType, table.contentId), ]); export const shareLinkViews = pgTable("share_link_views", { id: uuid("id").primaryKey().defaultRandom(), linkId: uuid("link_id").notNull().references(() => shareLinks.id, { onDelete: "cascade" }), // Viewer info (optional - null for anonymous) viewerId: uuid("viewer_id").references(() => users.id), // For analytics without PII ipHash: text("ip_hash"), // SHA-256 of IP for unique visitor counting userAgent: text("user_agent"), viewedAt: timestamp("viewed_at", { withTimezone: true }).defaultNow().notNull(), }, (table) => [ index("idx_share_link_views_link").on(table.linkId), ]); ``` ## Link Code Generation - 12 character alphanumeric (base62) - Example: "x7KmN2pQ4rYz" - Not sequential/guessable - Check for collisions on insert ## Public URLs - /share/{linkCode} - view shared content - No auth required to view - Optional password prompt ## Notes - viewCount is denormalized; increment on each view - isActive allows "revoking" without deleting - ipHash allows counting unique visitors without storing IPs ","status":"closed","priority":2,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-01-11T01:17:48.536748178-05:00","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-01-12T12:25:03.414877089-05:00","closed_at":"2026-01-12T12:25:03.414877089-05:00","close_reason":"Added share link in-memory schema/store, base62 codes, view tracking, and API routes"} {"id":"jeffreysprompts.com-czs","title":"Implement jfp bundles and bundle show -- Details: bundles lists all bundles with prompt counts. bundle show displays description, included prompts, workflow, when-to-use. --bundle flag on install creates combined skill.","status":"closed","priority":2,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-01-10T00:27:22.127698832-05:00","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-01-10T16:58:30.639704239-05:00","closed_at":"2026-01-10T16:58:30.639704239-05:00","close_reason":"CLI bundles + install --bundle already implemented","dependencies":[{"issue_id":"jeffreysprompts.com-czs","depends_on_id":"jeffreysprompts.com-wxb","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-01-10T00:37:44.410701829-05:00","created_by":"ubuntu"}]}
